title: Maple had a bad day 😔 #pets #cat #viral
prompt_text: An indoor scene featuring two cats sitting side-by-side on a reddish-brown tiled floor against a background of light-colored vertical wood paneling. On the left is a grey and brown tabby cat, and on the right is a ginger tabby cat. A person's hand with pink fingernails enters the frame from the left to gently scratch the grey cat under its chin. The lighting is bright and even, suggesting a well-lit domestic room. The camera captures the cats at a low angle, making them appear prominent in the frame.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: An indoor scene featuring two cats sitting side-by-side on a reddish-brown tiled floor against a background of light-colored vertical wood paneling. On the left is a grey and brown tabby cat, and on the right is a ginger tabby cat. A person's hand with pink fingernails enters the frame from the left to gently scratch the grey cat under its chin. The lighting is bright and even, suggesting a well-lit domestic room. The camera captures the cats at a low angle, making them appear prominent in the frame.
actions: The two cats sit calmly next to each other.
A hand enters from the left and scratches the grey tabby cat under the chin.
The grey tabby cat tilts its head back and closes its eyes, appearing to enjoy the scratch.
The ginger cat looks forward with a content and sleepy expression.
Both cats remain mostly still throughout the interaction.
dialogue: Pop music playing in the background with the lyrics: '...cause you had a bad day, you're taking one down, you sing a sad song just to turn it around...'
